message:
fix(tmux): rewrite FIFO reader to goroutine+channel instead of SetReadDeadline

Replace the SetReadDeadline-based polling loop in the pane streamer
with a proper goroutine+channel design. FIFOs do not reliably support
SetReadDeadline — the 10ms deadline was either silently ignored or
caused spurious timeout errors depending on the OS, leading to missed
lines or busy-loop CPU waste.

New design:
- Dedicated goroutine does blocking ReadString('\n') on the FIFO
- Lines sent on lineCh, errors on errCh
- Main loop does clean select over stop/context/flush/error/line
  channels
- Eliminates unreliable deadline-based polling entirely
- Properly handles FIFO close and context cancellation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
